anti_pattern: The failure snippet is placed under the CI link section while Which jobs are failing is empty
excerpt:
### Which jobs are failing
(empty)
### CI link
```
panic: test timed out after 5m0s
running tests:
  TestMixedTSODeployment (5m0s)
```
notes: Wrong section placement reduces readability and consistency.

anti_pattern: A very long full data-race stack dump is pasted in the Reason section (100+ lines)
excerpt:
### Reason for failure (if possible)
```log
WARNING: DATA RACE
Read at ...
Previous write at ...
...large middleware stack dump...
```
notes: Trim to the read/write pair and test clue instead of pasting the full trace.
Historical fixes suggest cluster bootstrap/environment jitter is common here; prioritize the Test line and core error signal in the excerpt.
Historical fixes suggest keeping conflicting variable access and key function frames for this race pattern.
Historical fixes suggest Error + Test lines are usually sufficient for this assertion fluctuation.
